title: Seasonal Cherries
description: Add-on for Serene Seasons: Make natural cherry leaves change foliage appearance based on season. Does not affect user-placed cherry leaves in builds.
body:
# Seasonal Cherries

An addon mod for [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons/versions) that makes cherry leaves change foliage across the season. If installed server-side, particles are also affected. See the beauty of all seasons in the cherry grove!

Only natural cherry leaves are affected, preserving builds that use the pink leaves.

![stages of cherry bloom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E5iwtrW7/images/fb1bdc6961604e7d247975576388eac5181edf7c.png)

![Autumn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E5iwtrW7/images/caacfc9dd17b1941ef4cbb75218eda9c09200c97.png)

![Winter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E5iwtrW7/images/6d5e4f28e7c4560623656caeb923df3fead27838.png)
